Based on the zoomed-in view of atom 24 (C), I can identify the following covalently connected neighbor atoms:

2. **Atom 25** - Element: C (Carbon) - part of the aromatic ring  
3. **Atom 58** - Element: H (Hydrogen) - attached hydrogen

**geomconf_index:** 4597

The carbon atom at index 24 is part of an aromatic ring structure and has three covalent bonds: two to adjacent carbon atoms in the ring (indices 23 and 25) and one to a hydrogen atom (index 58).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 24 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
